masked_text:
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00504:9e62fd3660a2]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00505:ff2eb9e78880]]{enumerate}
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00506:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00507:c04eb05dc1da]]{What matters is not the behavior itself but the purpose behind it}.The ultimate question is not whether a practice appears efficient or attractive, [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00508:c04eb05dc1da]]{but whether} it advances durable growth and responsible participation.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00509:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00510:c04eb05dc1da]]{A sound purpose should convert} temporary convenience [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00511:c04eb05dc1da]]{into} lasting competence, rather than leaving individuals with a mere illusion of progress.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00512:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00513:c04eb05dc1da]]{The same behavior may carry different meanings under different purposes}.An act deserves support only when it channels individual effort toward meaningful growth rather than temporary recognition.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00514:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00515:c04eb05dc1da]]{The same practice should be judged by its underlying purpose}.The real value of any approach lies in its capacity to orient people toward self-improvement, civic responsibility, and sustainable development.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00516:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00517:c04eb05dc1da]]{A careful distinction must be made between} purposeful effort and performative effort.What should be prioritized is not the visible form of progress, [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00518:c04eb05dc1da]]{but} the deeper improvement it brings to judgment and responsibility.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00519:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00520:c04eb05dc1da]]{The value of a practice depends largely on the intention that governs it}.The defining test is whether it helps individuals move from passive acceptance to purposeful action in a demanding world.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00521:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00522:c04eb05dc1da]]{A single action may lead to opposite outcomes when driven by different motives}, turning into one's improvement under clear purpose but into self-depletion under external pressure.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00523:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00524:c04eb05dc1da]]{It is necessary to distinguish} genuine commitment from anxious performance. [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00525:c04eb05dc1da]]{Only when guided} by a constructive purpose can this approach transform immediate utility into enduring personal and social value.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00526:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00527:c04eb05dc1da]]{The goal is not to} multiply options, accelerate procedures, or decorate appearances, [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00528:c04eb05dc1da]]{but to} enlarge people's capacity for thoughtful and responsible living.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00529:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00530:c04eb05dc1da]]{A practice becomes defensible only when its purpose remains sound}, otherwise it may preserve the appearance of progress while hollowing out its substance.A mature society should evaluate such practices by the quality of outcomes they cultivate, not by novelty, speed, or popularity alone.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00531:ab452bea72eb]] The same outward action may  [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00532:c04eb05dc1da]]{conceal different inner logics}. [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00533:c04eb05dc1da]]{Its proper role is to serve as} a bridge toward stronger autonomy, clearer judgment, and more disciplined long-term development.
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00534:06b3847e1b6f]]{enumerate}
read_only_context_before:
F00001-P00494:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00495:c04eb05dc1da]]{This is essentially a means-end reversal}: a method originally adopted to promote growth begins to dominate the very person it was meant to empower. [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00496:612fd64f8f84]]{blue}{This can already be seen in} people retreating to instant comfort whenever sustained effort becomes mentally demanding.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00497:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00498:c04eb05dc1da]]{The more powerful a method becomes, the more necessary its boundaries become}; otherwise, the promise of empowerment may quietly degenerate into dependence.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00499:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00500:c04eb05dc1da]]{A more defensible position is to affirm its instrumental value while cutting off} the dependence, vanity, exclusion, or shortcut mentality that distorts its original purpose.
    [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00501:ab452bea72eb]] [[PROTECTED:F00001-P00502:c04eb05dc1da]]{In this sense, the question is not whether the practice is useful, but whether} it remains subordinate to reflective judgment, human dignity, and long-term development.
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P00503:06b3847e1b6f]]{enumerate}
